season_weather: 初夏。桜はすでに散り、若葉・新緑が眩しい。汗ばむ陽気。Tシャツ・薄手シャツ
casual_outfit: Soft pink oversized sweater, high-waisted white linen shorts, beige espadrilles, delicate gold necklace, and a light crossbody bag.
room_wear: oversized white graphic T-shirt, light gray cotton biker shorts
pajamas: white oversized sleep T-shirt with small cartoon cat print, matching pastel shorts
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: pillow slightly off-center, bed casually made
room_seasonal: a small vase with fresh green leaves and white small flowers on the windowsill

afternoon.label: ゼミ
afternoon.scene: university seminar room, relief and tiredness after the presentation
afternoon.story_scene: campus hallway after seminar presentation, relieved expression, notebook under arm

evening.label: 推し活
evening.scene: at home watching anime or unboxing merch, sitting on bed with excitement

story_slots.scene_hint: 木曜日の朝 — ゼミに向けて準備中
